Roast Battle League The Roast Battle League comes to The Comedy Cellar for the first time. Comics from all over the globe will go head-to-head with four battles lined up, nothing is off-limits, and no ego is safe. Come see the first sport that’s also a comedy show live in the Mecca of ball busting and trash talking. Let’s Roast!

Rob Lewis American music arranger, music composer, record producer, musical director, film composer, musician, entrepreneur, and impresario. In his 20-plus years in the music industry, Lewis has worked on several Grammy Award winning singles and albums, and his production, songs, and arrangements have been featured on #1 albums, gold and platinum albums, films, live productions, and television shows.
